title: Arrange items on My Work (Today) by sliding up and down
excerpt:

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s great that the Priority status can be displayed on the My Work page now. Big thanks for getting that pushed out.

The next customization that would be very helpful for me would be the ability to order items on Today’s My Work group by sliding tasks up and/or down. It’s very often the case that a Priorty item gets pushed to handled an item that can get done in a short time period. In other task apps I’ve used in the past, I could order my tasks by the order I intended to tackle them, so I could just start at the top of the list and work my way down when I’m ready. Having 12 tasks all mixed up with regard to how much effor they’ll require, and what time of day they need to get done is really chaotic for me.
